images.caption: Keeper Paul Terry makes the save as Scott Nicholls clears the crease
Dave Slaughter attempts to steer Steve Gafny behind goal. Now, perhaps I'm biased, but that looks like a ward to me.
Darren Novell drives from behind goal as Kenton keeper Simon Savage looks on.
